title: 'Blow the Night!' Yoru o buttobase
original_title: "BLOW THE NIGHT!" 夜をぶっとばせ
overview: "BLOW THE NIGHT!" Let's Spend the Night Together is a 1983 Japanese docu-drama shot on 16mm film starring actual Yanki gang members as many of the main characters.
